metadata.season_coverage_note: Season 2025 is selectable, but it is still below the default scouting threshold (4 catcher rows, 1,600 scored pitches).
metadata.public_data_note: Public-data-first product using observed Statcast pitch outcomes, realistic pitcher-specific alternatives, and public catcher support metrics. It does not infer private PitchCom or hidden sign intent.

summary_insights.label: Strength
summary_insights.headline: The season line is still forming.
summary_insights.detail: Cal Raleigh has -0.226 total DVA and -0.00056 avg DVA so far, but no grade component is stable enough yet to call a true carrying tool.

summary_insights.label: Situational edge
summary_insights.headline: 0-1 is the best value pocket.
summary_insights.detail: Best exact-count edge is 0-1 (pitcher-friendly count) at +0.0008 avg DVA over 26 pitches. Best-performing family signal there is fastball. The broader full count bucket sits at -0.0001 avg DVA.

summary_insights.label: Pitch + pairing edge
summary_insights.headline: Pitch mix and battery fit add most of the secondary value.
summary_insights.detail: SI is the best pitch-type result at +0.0050 avg DVA over 80 pitches; the strongest pairing is with Jun Sung Park at +0.024 total DVA over 133 pitches.

summary_insights.label: Weakness
summary_insights.headline: 2-0 is the main pressure point.
summary_insights.detail: The weakest exact-count pocket is 2-0 (hitter-friendly count) at -0.0022 avg DVA over 32 pitches. The softest pitch-type result is CU at -0.0074 avg DVA.

summary_insights.label: Data confidence
summary_insights.headline: The sample is still directional rather than settled.
summary_insights.detail: Limited sample at 400 pitches across 27 games. -5.5% of eligible contexts dropped for sparse alternatives. +0.0005 avg execution gap.

steal_against_summary.note: This season has no long Statcast pitch descriptions stored yet, so exact-count steal outcomes cannot be derived honestly. Re-run Statcast ingestion for the season after adding pitches_raw.des.
